title: Shrek Lucky Block
description: Shrek lucky block, outhouses and more!
body:
# Shrek Lucky Block

Adds a shrek lucky block, onions, the Shrek outhouse and much much more!

## Shrek Lucky Block: 
- Contains 70 unique drops, ranging from custom items to wells to dangerous explosions

## Wells:
- The Shrek well contains 10 random outcomes as a reward or punishment, jump in at your own risk..

## Generation:
- Shrek outhouses spawn in swamp biomes with a lucky block inside
- Individual lucky blocks spawn randomly throughout the world

Note: this mod is currently in its beta stage, more features to come.
